onboarding.subtitle: Track spending, stay on budget, and enjoy smarter money decisions.
onboarding.notificationPrompt: Get reminded about your notes and daily spending goals.
onboarding.permissionsLater: You can enable permissions later in Settings.

home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's your financial overview.

dashboard.noData: Add your first transaction to get started!
dashboard.doingFine: You are doing fine this week

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.empty: No transactions yet. Tap + to add one.

compare.higher: Spending is {{percent}}% higher than last month.
compare.lower: Spending is {{percent}}% lower than last month.
compare.equal: Spending is the same as last month.
compare.todayHigher: Today's spending is {{amount}} more than yesterday.
compare.todayLower: Today's spending is {{amount}} less than yesterday.

nearby.title: Nearby
nearby.requestPermission: Allow location to find nearby options
nearby.permissionBody: To find nearby affordable options, we need access to your location. Your data stays on your device.
nearby.permissionDeniedForever: Location permission permanently denied. Please enable it in Settings.
nearby.affordanceHint: Based on your daily budget of {{budget}}
nearby.monthlyRemaining: RM{{amount}} remaining this month ({{days}} days left)
nearby.overBudget: Over budget by RM{{amount}} this month
nearby.subtitle: Cheap food, groceries, and essentials near you.
nearby.estimate: Set a daily budget in Settings to see personalized affordability
nearby.featureDisabledHint: Enable location in Settings to use Nearby
nearby.noPlacesFound: No nearby shops or amenities found within 500m.
nearby.expandSearch: Try moving to a more central area or expand the search radius.

ai.title: AI Suggestions
ai.subtitle: Smart tips based on your spending.
ai.needMoreData: Add a few more transactions to unlock suggestions.
ai.analyzing: Zeno AI is thinking... analyzing your spending to give personalized advice.
ai.adviceSubtitle: Let AI analyze your spending and give personalized advice.
ai.error: Couldn't get AI advice right now. Check your connection or try again.
ai.refreshHint: New advice appears as your spending changes.
ai.disabledBanner: AI suggestions are off. Enable in Settings to see live tips.

tips.title: Smart Tips
tips.0: Your dining-out expenses are high this week — try cooking at home to save ~25%.
tips.1: Set a monthly cap for transport to keep ride-hailing in check.
tips.2: Great job — your entertainment spending is down 18% from last week.

ai.saveGoal: Save tip: try a no-spend weekend to add {{amount}} to your budget.

insights.title: Personalized Insights
insights.noData: Add more transactions to unlock personalized insights.
insights.spendingPace_message: You spend {{dailyAvg}} per day — on track for {{projected}} this month.
insights.incomeHealth_message: Your expenses are {{percent}}% of your income.
insights.savingTip_message: Cutting {{category}} by {{percent}}% could save {{amount}} per month.
insights.weekendPatternMore_message: Weekend spending averages {{weekendAvg}}, {{percent}}% more than weekdays ({{weekdayAvg}}).
insights.weekendPatternLess_message: Weekend spending averages {{weekendAvg}}, {{percent}}% less than weekdays ({{weekdayAvg}}).
insights.budgetStatus_message: You've used {{percent}}% of your daily budget ({{spent}} of {{budget}}).
insights.monthComparisonHigher_message: Spending is {{percent}}% higher than last month ({{thisMonth}} vs {{lastMonth}}).
insights.monthComparisonLower_message: Spending is {{percent}}% lower than last month ({{thisMonth}} vs {{lastMonth}}).

advice.incomeExceedsDetail: Your spending of {{amount}} is {{percent}}% of your income — meaning you're spending more than you earn. This isn't sustainable. Try cutting dining, entertainment or shopping by at least 20% to balance your budget.
advice.watchSpendingDetail: You're using {{percent}}% of your income on expenses. Financial experts suggest keeping this under 70% so there's room for savings. A 10–15% reduction in non-essentials would make a big difference.
advice.healthyFinancesDetail: Your expenses are just {{percent}}% of your income — you're in great shape. Consider putting the extra into savings or investments.
advice.topCategoryDetail: {{category}} makes up {{percent}}% of your spending. Reducing this category by just 10% could save you {{amount}} this month.
advice.dailyPaceDetail: You average {{dailyAvg}} per day, projecting to {{projected}} this month. {{trendNote}}
advice.dailyPaceFaster: Your pace suggests spending may accelerate — try setting a daily target.
advice.dailyPaceSteady: Your steady pace makes budgeting predictable — great work!
advice.saveOnDetail: Cutting {{category}} by 15% would save {{amount}} per month. Those savings add up fast — try meal planning or using loyalty programs.
advice.spendingUpDetail: Your spending is up {{percent}}% compared to last month. Check if this was a one-off expense or a new trend forming.
advice.spendingDownDetail: Great work — spending dropped {{percent}}% from last month. Keep building on this momentum!
advice.analysisNoExpenses: No expenses recorded this month yet. Add a few transactions to get personalized AI advice.
advice.analysisNoIncome: You've spent {{amount}} this month. Without income data, I can't assess your savings ratio — consider adding your income for a complete picture.
advice.analysisOverspend: This month: {{amount}} spent against {{income}} earned ({{percent}}% ratio). Your spending is outpacing your income right now.
advice.analysisModerate: You're spending {{amount}} of your {{income}} income ({{percent}}%). A comfortable spot — but there's room to build more savings.
advice.analysisGreat: You're in great shape — {{amount}} spent vs {{income}} earned ({{percent}}% of income). Keep it up!
advice.motivationExcellent: You're managing your money exceptionally well — keep setting that high bar!
advice.motivationOverspend: It's never too late to turn things around — start with one small change today!
advice.motivationDefault: Small daily choices create big financial wins over time — you've got this!

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: This will erase all data. Are you sure?
settings.resetComplete: All data has been cleared. The app will reset now.
settings.nearbyPermissionRequired: Enable location permission to use Nearby suggestions
settings.dailyBudgetHint: Set a daily spending limit for the Daily Challenge
settings.mysticCoinsInfo: Earned by completing the Daily Challenge

dailyChallenge.title: Daily Challenge
dailyChallenge.noBudget: No daily budget set. Set one in Settings to start the challenge!
dailyChallenge.underBudget: You're on track! Keep it up 👍
dailyChallenge.warning60: 🐢 Whoa! You've used 60% of your daily budget. Time to slow down!
dailyChallenge.warning90: 🚨 RED ALERT! 90% of your budget is gone! Abort unnecessary spending! 🚨
dailyChallenge.overBudget: Over budget today! Try again tomorrow 💪
dailyChallenge.noExpenses: No expenses today. Challenge already won! 🏆

mysticCoins.title: Mystic Coins
mysticCoins.description: Maybe can use somewhere in the future
mysticCoins.dailyReward: Earn 1 coin per day by staying within your daily budget
